mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_od_worker WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT * FROM tb_od_worker WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_od_worker WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_od_worker WHERE deleted = 0 AND judge = #{judge}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_od_worker WHERE deleted = 0 AND division = #{division}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_od_worker (employee_no, name, dept, job, gender, birth_date, division, factor, carcinogenicity, exposure_period, exam_org, exam_date, judge, after_action, action_done, deleted, created_at, modified_at) VALUES ( #{employeeNo}, #{name}, #{dept}, #{job}, #{gender}, #{birthDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{division}'정기', #{factor}, #{carcinogenicity}, #{exposurePeriod}, #{examOrg}, #{examDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{judge}, #{afterAction}, #{actionDone}, 0, #{createdByUserId}, #{createdByName}, #{createdByTeam}, #{createdByPosition}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_od_worker SET employee_no = #{employeeNo}, name = #{name}, dept = #{dept}, job = #{job}, gender = #{gender}, birth_date = #{birthDate,jdbcType=DATE}, division = #{division}, factor = #{factor}, carcinogenicity = #{carcinogenicity}, exposure_period = #{exposurePeriod}, exam_org = #{examOrg}, exam_date = #{examDate,jdbcType=DATE}, judge = #{judge}, after_action = #{afterAction}, action_done = #{actionDone}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_od_worker SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
